//: MassRTS asset manifest — swap art without recompiling. All keys optional.
//models: file is relative to assets/models/. Only infantry/cavalry/archer render as distinct meshes (engine uses 3 mesh buckets); other types reuse them or billboards. scale = extra render multiplier.
//audio: logical name -> file path relative to assets/. Overrides built-in synth/wav.
//effects: r,g,b in 0..1 tint particle color; count = particles per burst. -1 = keep default.
